meaning: adj.次要的,从属的,下级的n.下属v.服从
examples: Sixty of his subordinate officers followed his example.
He was both willing and able to subordinate all else to this aim.
He contented himself with a subordinate job.
Weliky says this workplace dynamic can be the most damaging because it infantilizes the female subordinate.
If Mr Redstone is not the ideal boss, neither is Mr Karmazin the perfect subordinate.
